front: Novel: the protagonist, a University of Missouri English professor, is inspired to study literature by Shakespeare's Sonnet 73
Novel: the protagonist feuds with the crippled colleague Hollis Lomax for 20 years after savagely interrogating a student during a thesis defense
Novel: the protagonist has an affair with Kathrine Driscoll; a 2018 biography called the author 'The man who wrote the perfect novel'
Novel: saw a dramatic rise in popularity after its 2013 reissue by NYRB Classics; a French translation by Anna Gavalda made it a bestseller in Europe
Novel: McDonald tells the protagonist 'You get born, and you nurse on lies, and you wean on lies' after he returns to the title frontier locale
Novel: an epistolary novel about the Roman emperor in which only the last few letters are written by Octavian himself
